steps.action: Fixed auth database corruption (credentials table referencing non-existent users_old table)
steps.expected: Database schema valid for credential storage
steps.observed: Database backup created and fresh database with correct schema created

steps.action: Run Playwright tests for etext research button (etext-research-button.spec.js)
steps.expected: All tests pass confirming research button spawns worker
steps.observed: 9/9 tests passed (20.1s): Research button visible, spawns worker with document context, progress indicator shows, results appear, Apply/Dismiss buttons work

evidence.network: Playwright tests passed confirming end-to-end flow

frictions.description: agent-browser CLI does not expose CDP commands needed for WebAuthn virtual authenticator setup required for passkey registration
frictions.resolution: Used Playwright tests with virtual authenticator support as alternative validation method

frictions.description: Auth database had schema corruption where credentials and refresh_sessions tables referenced non-existent users_old table
frictions.resolution: Backed up corrupted database and restarted auth service to create fresh database with correct schema

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-CHOIR-007 etext research/revise button functionality validated through successful Playwright test execution (9/9 tests passed). The feature correctly spawns worker tasks, shows progress, and displays results.
